name: Italian Christmas Bread
recipeInstructions:
1. Soften yeast in lukewarm water.
2. Combine sugar, salt, butter, and remaining water.
3. Mix non-fat milk solids with 1 cup flour.
4. Remove 1 tablespoon white from the eggs; set aside for glaze.
5. Add remainder of eggs, vanilla, and softened yeast to the mixture.
6. Beat until smooth.
7. Gradually add 1 cup flour with fruits and nuts.
8. Blend in and continue adding remaining flour to form a soft dough.
9. Turn out onto a lightly floured pastry cloth and knead until smooth.
10. Place in a greased bowl, turning once to bring the greased side up.
11. Cover and let rise in a warm place until doubled in bulk (1 hour and 20 minutes).
12. Turn out on a pastry cloth and knead.
13. Shape into a round loaf and place in a greased 8 or 9 inch round cake pan.
14. Brush with egg white, cover, and let rise until doubled in bulk (40 minutes).
15. Brush again with egg white and bake in a slow oven (325°F) for 55 to 60 minutes.
16. Cover with foil after 15 minutes of baking to prevent overbrowning.
Makes one round loaf.
